phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso principale del Duomo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH ling-GRES-so preen-chee-PAH-leh del DOO-oh-mo, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: On the square, facing the facade.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è la biglietteria, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, do-VEH la bee-lyet-te-REE-a, per fa-VO-re?

responses.english: The ticket office is on the left.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si prenota la visita guidata, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KO-meh see preh-NOH-ta la VEE-zee-ta gwee-DAH-ta, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: It is necessary to book online.

phrases.intent_en: Ask when the cathedral was built
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quando è stato costruito il Duomo di Como?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-doh eh STAH-toh kos-TWEE-toh eel DWOH-moh dee KOH-moh?
phrases.cultural_note: Como's cathedral was built over four centuries, from 1396 to 1770, blending Gothic and Baroque elements.

responses.english: Between 1396 and 1770, late Gothic and Baroque.
responses.phonetic: trah eel trehd-DEE-chee-NOH-vahn-tah-SEH-ee eh eel meel-leh-SET-ten-tah, een STEEL-eh TAR-doh GOH-tee-koh eh bah-ROK-koh.
responses.local: Tra il 1396 e il 1770, in stile tardo-gotico e barocco.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the rooftop can be visited
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, si può salire sul tetto del Duomo?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, see PWOH sah-LEE-reh sool TET-toh del DWOH-moh?

responses.english: No, the roof is not accessible to the public.
responses.phonetic: no, eel TET-toh non eh at-ches-SEE-bee-leh al POOB-blee-koh.
responses.local: No, il tetto non è accessibile al pubblico.
